actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The bandit makes two Scimitar attacks.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6+1) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Light Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +3, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8+1) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Dark Devotion
special_abilities.desc: The cultist has Advantage on saving throws against the Charmed and Frightened conditions.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6+1) Slashing damage.

special_abilities.name: Nimble Escape
special_abilities.desc: The goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a Bonus Action.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The goblin makes two Scimitar attacks.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The kobold has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is adjacent to the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the kobold has Disadvantage on attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Sling
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 30/120 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) Bludgeoning damage.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The wolf has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is adjacent to the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4+2) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or have the Prone condition.

name: Giant Spider
senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 10

special_abilities.name: Spider Climb
special_abilities.desc: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

special_abilities.name: Web Walker
special_abilities.desc: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Poison damage. The target must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or have the Poisoned condition for 1 hour. While poisoned in this way, the target is also Paralyzed.

actions.name: Web (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 30/60 ft. Hit: The target has the Restrained condition until the web is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Vulnerability to Fire damage; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage).

name: Skeleton
languages: understands the languages it knew in life

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The skeleton makes two Shortsword or Shortbow attacks.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) Piercing damage.

name: Zombie
languages: understands the languages it knew in life

special_abilities.name: Undead Fortitude
special_abilities.desc: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the zombie drops to 1 Hit Point instead.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6+1) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6+2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4+2) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't Undead, it must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or have the Paralyzed condition for 1 minute. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

special_abilities.name: Martial Advantage
special_abilities.desc: Once per turn, the hobgoblin can deal an extra 7 (2d6) damage to a creature it hits with a weapon attack if that creature is within 5 feet of an ally of the hobgoblin that doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8+1) Slashing damage, or 6 (1d10+1) Slashing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +3, range 150/600 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8+1) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Aggressive
special_abilities.desc: As a Bonus Action, the orc can move up to its Speed toward a hostile creature it can see.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The orc makes two Greataxe attacks.

actions.name: Greataxe
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (1d12+3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The ogre makes two Greatclub attacks.

actions.name: Greatclub
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8+4) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6+4) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Keen Smell
special_abilities.desc: The troll has Advantage on Perception checks that rely on smell.

special_abilities.name: Regeneration
special_abilities.desc: The troll regains 10 Hit Points at the start of its turn. If the troll takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 Hit Points and doesn't regenerate.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The troll makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6+4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6+4) Slashing damage.

name: Black Dragon Wyrmling
senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: The dragon can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes one Bite attack.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10+2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Acid damage.

actions.name: Acid Breath (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Failure: 22 (5d8) Acid damage. Success: Half damage.

special_abilities.name: Keen Sight and Smell
special_abilities.desc: The owlbear has Advantage on Perception checks that rely on sight or smell.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The owlbear makes one Beak attack and one Claws attack.

actions.name: Beak
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (1d10+5) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8+5) Slashing damage.
